### last time {.smaller}

*  secure communication with math
*  confidentiality via encryption
*  authenticity via message authentication codes (MACs) or signatures
*  cryptographic hash function ("secure summary")
*  OS and hardware help random numbers

### homework notes

*  life HW
   *  on threading with barriers
*  (thread) pool HW
   *  on threading with monitors
   *  new this semester
   *  (based on an assignment I've given in old curriculum)
   *  replaces pipelining (next topic) HW

### finishing up secure communication

# key agreement {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /secure/_key-agreement.qmd >}}

# putting it together: TLS {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /secure/_tls.qmd >}}

## handshake {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /secure/_tls-handshake-summary.qmd >}}

## after handshake {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /secure/_tls-after-handshake.qmd >}}

{{< include /pipeline/_talk-inner.qmd >}}

### backup slides


{{< include /pipeline/_talk-backup.qmd >}}
